name: Chest CT Without Contrast
description: Standard chest CT report template for lung evaluation without contrast

findings.technique: CT of the chest was performed from the lung apices through the adrenals without intravenous contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior chest CT for comparison.

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content:
Right lung: [No focal consolidation / No pulmonary nodule / No pleural effusion] identified.
Left lung: [No focal consolidation / No pulmonary nodule / No pleural effusion] identified.
Lung parenchyma otherwise [clear / shows emphysematous changes].

sections.name: Trachea and Main Bronchi
sections.content: The trachea and main bronchi are [patent / show no evidence of obstruction or stenosis].

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: No pleural effusion or pneumothorax identified. Pleural surfaces are [unremarkable / show minimal pleural thickening].

sections.name: Mediastinum
sections.content: The mediastinal [lymph nodes are not enlarged / no lymphadenopathy identified]. [The aortic arch is normal in caliber / No abnormality of the great vessels].

sections.name: Heart
sections.content: The heart [is normal in size / no pericardial effusion / no abnormal findings]. Coronary artery calcification is [minimal / moderate].

sections.name: Upper Abdomen
sections.content: The liver, spleen, and adrenal glands [are unremarkable / no abnormalities identified].

impression:
1. No acute cardiopulmonary process identified.
2. [No pulmonary nodule requiring follow-up / Recommend routine screening].
author: RadReport Templates
